positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_problem
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u64,axiom,
    sK5 = sK6).

cnf(u33,axiom,
    sK1 != sK4).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    sK2 != sK4).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    in_six_way_tie(sK4)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    sK1 != sK2).

cnf(u45,axiom,
    in_six_way_tie(sK1)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    sK4 != sK5).

cnf(u47,axiom,
    in_six_way_tie(sK6)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    sK0 != sK5).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    sK2 != sK5).

cnf(u48,axiom,
    steinhauer != descampe).

cnf(u41,axiom,
    in_six_way_tie(sK5)).

cnf(u38,axiom,
    sK0 != sK3).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    sK2 != sK3).

cnf(u43,axiom,
    in_six_way_tie(sK3)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    sK1 != sK5).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~in_six_way_tie(X6) | sK1 = X6 | sK2 = X6 | sK3 = X6 | sK4 = X6 | sK5 = X6 | sK0 = X6).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    sK1 != sK3).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    sK3 != sK5).

cnf(u44,axiom,
    in_six_way_tie(sK2)).

cnf(u37,axiom,
    sK0 != sK4).

cnf(u49,negated_conjecture,
    ~in_six_way_tie(descampe)).

cnf(u46,axiom,
    in_six_way_tie(sK0)).

cnf(u39,axiom,
    sK0 != sK2).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    sK3 != sK4).

cnf(u40,axiom,
    sK0 != sK1).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define winner(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define on_leaderboard(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define participated(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define from_belgium(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
